title: Colloquium: Introduction to History
catalogDescription: Introduction to the discipline of history for new or prospective majors. Emphasizes the basic skills of reading, analysis, and communication (both verbal and written) that are central to the historian's craft. Each seminar discusses a different subject or problem.

title: Colloquium in Historiography
